prose:
**Fukui reactivity analysis for nitrobenzene** — DFT, **B3LYP/def2-TZVP** (density-fitted) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0 / multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied `.xyz`. Mulliken charge scheme. Reactivity computed via cation (N+1) and anion (N−1) perturbations (both spin multiplicity 2). SCF converged for all three states; charge-conservation checks ✓.

**Most electrophilic site:** Atom 4 (ortho-carbon on benzene ring), **f⁺ = 0.496**, dual descriptor = 0.511 — strongly susceptible to electrophilic attack.

**Most nucleophilic site:** Atom 5 (meta-carbon), **f⁻ = 0.107** — modest nucleophilicity.

The ortho-position's high electrophilic Fukui index reflects the electron-withdrawing inductive effect of the NO₂ group. Visualization plot generated.

No warnings raised. Integrity status: trustworthy ✓

**Method:** DFT B3LYP/def2-TZVP via PySCF; Fukui indices computed from Mulliken population analysis of neutral, cationic, and anionic electronic states.</prose>
<parameter name="integrity_trustworthy">true
